sk.question: Koľko stojí skúška svadobných šiat?
sk.answer: 15 € za 60 minút — max 2 blízke osoby, prosecco, nealko alebo káva v cene.

sk.question: Ponúkate aj online konzultácie?
sk.answer: Áno, časť plánovania vieme riešiť aj online.

en.question: How much does a wedding dress fitting cost?
en.answer: 15 € for 60 minutes — up to 2 close persons, prosecco, non-alcoholic or coffee included.

en.question: Can I take photos during the fitting?
How do I book an appointment?
en.answer: Via form, WhatsApp, email or phone call.

en.question: Do you offer online consultations?
en.answer: Yes, part of the planning can be done online.
